text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Today, Doto is running in her first graded race! Please, please, please don't let what I told her mess her up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto got second place! She's so happy she comes
to thank me for talking to her the other day!
Oooh, her admiration for Opera O is just so...
dazzling!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But her admiration doesn't come from a place of
moe—it's her motivating drive! The feelings which
drive Umamusume to run are more pure than I
realized!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I must dash into that brilliant unknown world and
learn its truths. There's nothing to it but to take
another look at the Hyacinth Stakes!
